assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md lines 44-70 show all four required sections parsed with the correct heading formats: Description (from `### **Issue Description**`), Steps to Reproduce (from `### **Steps to Reproduce**`), Expected Result (from `### **Expected Result**`), and Actual Result (from `### **Actual Result**`). Line 90 states: 'All four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) are present.'

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md lines 17-19: 'Issue ACME-500 has issue type Bug with ID **10020**' / 'Bug Configuration specifies Bug issue type ID **10020**' / '**Match confirmed.** Issue type validation passed.'

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: investigation.md lines 16-24 trace the code path showing `section_name = line[3:]` extracts heading text without stripping trailing whitespace. Line 23: 'The `line[3:]` slice does **NOT** strip trailing whitespace'. Lines 35-36: 'The actual behavior diverges from expected at the heading extraction step (step 3 above). The extracted section name includes trailing whitespace, causing all subsequent exact-match lookups to fail.' Line 66: 'The root cause is isolated to a single code path: heading extraction in plan-feature’s convention lookup.'

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: root-cause.md lines 7-8: WHAT — 'extracts CONVENTIONS.md heading text using line[3:], which preserves trailing whitespace'. WHERE — 'The plan-feature skill’s convention conformance analysis' and lines 11-12 list affected files in 'plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md — convention conformance analysis section'. HOW TO VERIFY — lines 24-27 provide a full reproducer strategy: '1. Create a CONVENTIONS.md fixture file with trailing whitespace on at least one heading... 3. Assert that the generated task’s Implementation Notes include the convention reference... 4. The reproducer should fail before the fix and pass after the fix.'

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 35-39 show Acceptance Criteria. The FIRST item (line 36) is: '- [ ] Reproducer test demonstrates the bug: creates a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on headings, runs plan-feature convention lookup, and fails before the fix is applied (convention silently dropped)'. This comes before the fix criteria on lines 37-39.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 40-44 show Test Requirements. The FIRST item (line 41) is: '- [ ] Reproducer test: create a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on at least one heading (e.g., `## Migration Patterns  `), run the convention lookup, and assert: (1) convention name "Migration Patterns" is found in extracted conventions, (2) generated Implementation Notes contain `Per CONVENTIONS.md §Migration Patterns:` reference'. This includes explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (matching the fixture heading and checking Implementation Notes output).

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 45-52 contain a '## Bug Context' section with: Bug key '[ACME-500](https://mock-jira.example.com/browse/ACME-500)', Steps to Reproduce ('Create CONVENTIONS.md with trailing whitespace on heading...'), Expected Result ('Implementation Notes include Per CONVENTIONS.md §Migration Patterns...'), Actual Result ('Implementation Notes do NOT reference the Migration Patterns convention; convention silently dropped with no warning'), and Root Cause ('Heading extraction uses line[3:] without stripping trailing whitespace, causing exact-match convention lookups to fail silently').

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 10-11: '## Target Branch' followed by 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence:
task-description.md lines 1-5 contain the Jira API metadata block: '<!-- Jira API metadata
project: ACME
issueType: Task
labels: ["ai-generated-jira"]
-->'. The labels field includes 'ai-generated-jira'.
